typecheck.command: echo "No typecheck configured (no mypy/pyright in project)"

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add clarification to 'Functions over classes' rule: 'Exception: test classes (e.g., class TestDeriveProject) are acceptable for grouping related test methods — this is standard pytest convention.'
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature test-suite uses test classes (TestDeriveProject, TestSearchFts, etc.) across both test files. This is standard pytest practice but technically conflicts with the blanket 'functions over classes' rule.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add to Testing section: 'Test imports use dotted package paths (e.g., from src.memory_db import get_conn). This requires the package to be installed in editable mode (pip install -e .) — run the install command from services.yaml before running tests.'
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature test-suite imports from src.ingest and src.memory_db using dotted package paths that only work when the package is pip-installed in editable mode. This dependency is implicit and could confuse future workers.
